mission: A structured digital Islamic library for preserving clean collections of lectures, books, Islamic sciences, and history.
about: Project ALBACAT is inspired by the teachings of Sheikh Muhammad Auwal Albani Zaria. It preserves authenticity, originality, and organized access to Islamic learning.
